% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!

8. ! [X0] : (related(basque,X0) => X0 = basque) [input(axiom)]
9. french != spanish & french != german & french != basque & spanish != german & spanish != basque & german != basque [input(axiom)]
10. ~romance(basque) [input(conjecture)]
11. ~~romance(basque) [negated conjecture 10]
12. romance(basque) [flattening 11]
14. ! [X0] : (member_of(X0,romance_family) | ~romance(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
15. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (related(X1,X2) | (~language_family(X0) | ~member_of(X1,X0) | ~member_of(X2,X0))) [ennf transformation 4]
16. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (related(X1,X2) | ~language_family(X0) | ~member_of(X1,X0) | ~member_of(X2,X0)) [flattening 15]
17. ! [X0] : (X0 = basque | ~related(basque,X0)) [ennf transformation 8]
18. language_family(romance_family) [cnf transformation 2]
19. member_of(X0,romance_family) | ~romance(X0) [cnf transformation 14]
20. ~member_of(X2,X0) | ~language_family(X0) | ~member_of(X1,X0) | related(X1,X2) [cnf transformation 16]
22. romance(spanish) [cnf transformation 6]
24. ~related(basque,X0) | basque = X0 [cnf transformation 17]
26. spanish != basque [cnf transformation 9]
31. romance(basque) [cnf transformation 12]
32. ~language_family(romance_family) | ~member_of(X0,romance_family) | related(X0,X1) | ~romance(X1) [resolution 20,19]
33. ~member_of(X0,romance_family) | related(X0,X1) | ~romance(X1) [forward subsumption resolution 32,18]
34. related(X0,X1) | ~romance(X1) | ~romance(X0) [resolution 33,19]
35. ~romance(X0) | ~romance(basque) | basque = X0 [resolution 34,24]
36. ~romance(X0) | basque = X0 [forward subsumption resolution 35,31]
39. spanish = basque [resolution 36,22]
40. $false [forward subsumption resolution 39,26]
